name: terraform-skill
description: > Operational traps for Terraform provisioners, multi-environment isolation, and zero-to-deployment reliability. Use when writing null_resource / remote-exec / local-exec / file provisioners, setting up fresh instances with cloud-init, or any IaC code that SSHs into remote hosts; when creating multi-environment Terraform setups (DNS record duplication, snapshot cross-contamination); or when debugging containers that are Restarting/unhealthy after terraform apply. Also when the user mentions terr
author: daymade
